heroSubtitle: Free guides, templates and tools to help your business leverage technology
intro: We believe in sharing knowledge. These resources are free to download and use — whether you're a client or not. If you find them helpful, we'd love to hear from you.

resources.title: Digital Transformation Readiness Checklist
resources.description: A practical checklist to assess how ready your business is for digital transformation. Covers workflows, technology gaps, team readiness and budget considerations.

resources.title: Automation Opportunity Finder
resources.description: A worksheet to help you identify which business processes are the best candidates for automation. Score processes on repetitiveness, error-rate, time-cost and complexity.

resources.title: Software Requirements Document Template
resources.description: A ready-to-use template for documenting your software project requirements. Covers functional requirements, user stories, technical constraints and acceptance criteria.

resources.title: Fleet Management Digitalisation Guide
resources.description: A comprehensive guide to digitising fleet operations — from job cards to compliance. Covers the business case, implementation steps and common pitfalls to avoid.

resources.title: Construction Digital Compliance Guide
resources.description: How to move from paper-based to digital BCAR compliance. Step-by-step guide covering inspection workflows, report automation and regulatory requirements.

resources.title: Sustainability ROI Calculator
resources.description: An Excel template to calculate the return on investment of sustainable construction practices. Includes property value uplift, material lifecycle costs and government incentive calculations.

resources.title: Website Project Planning Template
resources.description: Plan your website project from the start. Covers site structure, content requirements, design preferences, technical needs and launch checklist.

resources.title: Website SEO Audit Checklist
resources.description: A practical SEO audit checklist to evaluate your website's search engine performance. Covers technical SEO, content, mobile-friendliness and page speed.

cta.title: Need Help Implementing These?
cta.description: These resources are a great starting point, but implementing them properly takes expertise. We're here to help.
